title: cupania laevis
intro: Cupania laevis, also known as the smooth calabash tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cupania laevis include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its use as a remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make these preparations.
